member.name: T:SPOneHRApp.AppConstants
member.summary: Central config — update ServerUrl before building the APK.

member.name: T:SPOneHRApp.BootReceiver
member.summary: Restarts the WFH tracking service if the phone reboots during an active WFH session.

member.name: T:SPOneHRApp.SPOneHRWebChromeClient
member.summary: Custom WebChromeClient â€” auto-grants GPS and camera permissions to the Blazor PWA page so it can use selfie capture and location.

member.name: T:SPOneHRApp.WFHJavascriptBridge
member.summary: Injected into the WebView as window.AndroidBridge. The existing wfhTracking.js calls: window.AndroidBridge.startNativeTracking(empId) window.AndroidBridge.stopNativeTracking() window.AndroidBridge.isNativeApp() window.AndroidBridge.getDeviceInfo() These bridge calls start/stop the WFHLocationService background GPS service.

member.name: M:SPOneHRApp.WFHJavascriptBridge.DownloadFile(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Called by window.downloadFile() in the web app when running inside the APK. Saves the base64-encoded file to the Android Downloads folder and shows a toast.

member.name: T:SPOneHRApp.Resource
member.summary: Android Resource Designer class. Exposes the Android Resource designer assembly into the project Namespace.
